stemHtml: Which of the following may force an aircraft in flight into a ditching situation?

options.a: The loss of cabin pressurisation when flying above 18 000 feet.
options.b: An engine failure on a two-engined aircraft.
options.c: The discovery of a suspect device on board believed to be a bomb.
options.d: A smoke, fire, or fumes situation that becomes uncontrollable.
